nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Samar Island Natural Park
nodes.summary: Samar Island Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Southern sooty woodpecker
nodes.summary: Southern sooty woodpecker（Southern sooty woodpecker，学名 Mulleripicus fuliginosus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Pasonanca Natural Park
nodes.summary: Pasonanca Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo、Chocolate boobook等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas on Pasonanca Natural Park and Samar Island Natural Park

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas on Pasonanca Natural Park and Samar Island Natural Park

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its main threat is habitat destruction through both legal and Illegal logging, conversion into farmlands through Slash-and-burn, charcoal burning, and mining
